message:
feat(fp-frame): Series.dt.microsecond accessor + FP-P2D-415 parity fixture

Wires pandas Series.dt.microsecond through the fp-frame DatetimeAccessor
and plumbs the new operation through fp-conformance so it is exercised
end-to-end from the packet harness.

fp-frame changes (crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs):
- New DatetimeAccessor::microsecond() method, matching the pd.Series.dt.microsecond
  contract: extracts the microsecond component (0..=999_999) from datetime-like
  Utf8 values and emits an Int64 series, with Null(NullKind::NaN) for inputs that
  fail to parse (mirroring the dayofweek / hour / minute / second siblings
  already in this module).
- Underlying parse_datetime_microsecond helper handles three input shapes:
  - tz-aware strings route through parse_tz_aware_datetime and read
    timestamp_subsec_micros from the fixed-offset DateTime.
  - naive datetimes route through parse_naive_datetime_value and read
    timestamp_subsec_micros from the resulting NaiveDateTime (and_utc).
  - empty / un-parseable strings yield Null(NaN), matching the existing
    component-extraction behavior.
- Truncation behavior matches pandas: "2024-06-15T12:34:56.987654321" → 987654
  (nanoseconds are silently dropped). A bare "2024-06-15" (no time) yields 0,
  consistent with the hour/minute/second accessors on the same input.
- New test_dt_microsecond unit test pins all four shapes (microsecond-suffix,
  nanosecond-suffix, date-only, garbage) to their expected outputs.

fp-conformance changes (crates/fp-conformance/src/lib.rs):
- New FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond variant (serde alias
  "series_dt_microsecond_default" for parity with the rest of the dt family).
- Added to the six match arms that enumerate SeriesDt* operations
  (compat_contract_rows_for_operation, run_fixture_operation,
  fixture_expected, capture_live_oracle_expected,
  execute_series_module_utility_fixture_operation,
  execute_and_compare_differential) so strict + differential paths both
  dispatch correctly.

Packet fixture (crates/fp-conformance/fixtures/packets/fp_p2d_415_series_dt_microsecond_basic_strict.json):
- New strict-mode packet FP-P2D-415 with four rows covering the same shapes
  the unit test covers, so the packet harness pins fp-frame <-> pandas parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -621,6 +621,11 @@ pub enum FixtureOperation {
     SeriesDtMinute,
     #[serde(rename = "series_dt_second", alias = "series_dt_second_default")]
     SeriesDtSecond,
+    #[serde(
+        rename = "series_dt_microsecond",
+        alias = "series_dt_microsecond_default"
+    )]
+    SeriesDtMicrosecond,
     #[serde(rename = "series_dt_dayofweek", alias = "series_dt_dayofweek_default")]
     SeriesDtDayofweek,
     #[serde(rename = "series_dt_quarter", alias = "series_dt_quarter_default")]
@@ -1169,6 +1174,7 @@ impl FixtureOperation {
             Self::SeriesDtHour => "series_dt_hour",
             Self::SeriesDtMinute => "series_dt_minute",
             Self::SeriesDtSecond => "series_dt_second",
+            Self::SeriesDtMicrosecond => "series_dt_microsecond",
             Self::SeriesDtDayofweek => "series_dt_dayofweek",
             Self::SeriesDtQuarter => "series_dt_quarter",
             Self::SeriesDtDayofyear => "series_dt_dayofyear",
@@ -2041,6 +2047,7 @@ fn compat_contract_rows_for_operation(operation: FixtureOperation) -> &'static [
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond
+        | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtQuarter
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofyear
@@ -7867,6 +7874,7 @@ fn run_fixture_operation(
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond
+        | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtQuarter
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofyear
@@ -9470,6 +9478,7 @@ fn fixture_expected(fixture: &PacketFixture) -> Result<ResolvedExpected, Harness
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond
+        | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtQuarter
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofyear
@@ -10047,6 +10056,7 @@ fn capture_live_oracle_expected(
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond
+        | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtQuarter
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofyear
@@ -12869,6 +12879,9 @@ fn execute_series_module_utility_fixture_operation(
         FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour => series.dt().hour().map_err(|err| err.to_string()),
         FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute => series.dt().minute().map_err(|err| err.to_string()),
         FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond => series.dt().second().map_err(|err| err.to_string()),
+        FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond => {
+            series.dt().microsecond().map_err(|err| err.to_string())
+        }
         FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek => {
             series.dt().dayofweek().map_err(|err| err.to_string())
         }
@@ -15653,6 +15666,7 @@ fn execute_and_compare_differential(
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtHour
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMinute
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtSecond
+        | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtMicrosecond
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofweek
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtQuarter
         | FixtureOperation::SeriesDtDayofyear
